quick_skim.title: 3DLS: A 3D Logic-Stacked Architecture for Disaggregated LLM Serving
quick_skim.abstract: Large language model (LLM) serving increasingly combines prefill-decode (PD) disaggregation with tensor parallelism (TP) to support large models and long contexts. In conventional 2D/2.5D chiplet architectures, layer-wise prefill-to-decode KV-cache transfer decode-side TP collectives share the same lateral die-to-die (D2D) interconnect, creating mixed-traffic contention on the decode critical path. This contention increases communication latency, prolongs token generation intervals, and degrades end-to-end serving performance. We propose 3DLS, a logic-on-logic 3D-stacked chiplet architecture that separates traffic classes by routing KV-cache transfers through vertical interconnects while preserving decode-side TP collectives on the lateral D2D fabric. 3DLS achieves up to 1.49$\times$ throughput and 60.2\% lower end-to-end (E2E) latency over the shared-fabric planar baseline, and still achieves up to 1.17$\times$ throughput and 31.4\% lower E2E latency over a workload-aware priority-managed planar baseline. These results highlight that physical isolation is an important design principle for future chiplet-based PD-disaggregated LLM serving systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: 3D-stacked chiplet architecture for LLM serving, addressing interconnect contention
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于LLM服务的3D堆叠芯片架构，解决互连争用
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于LLM服务的3D堆叠芯片架构，解决互连争用
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于LLM服务的3D堆叠芯片架构，解决互连争用
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes 3DLS, a logic-on-logic 3D-stacked chiplet architecture that separates KV-cache transfer and decode-side collectives via vertical and lateral interconnects to reduce contention.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出3DLS，一种逻辑堆叠的3D芯片架构，通过垂直互连传输KV缓存、横向互连维持解码侧张量并行集合，有效缓解传统2.5D芯片中混合流量争用，降低通信延迟并提升LLM服务吞吐量。该工作直接针对3D芯片互连设计，对SI/PI分析具有参考价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出3DLS，一种逻辑堆叠的3D芯片架构，通过垂直互连传输KV缓存、横向互连维持解码侧张量并行集合，有效缓解传统2.5D芯片中混合流量争用，降低通信延迟并提升LLM服务吞吐量。该工作直接针对3D芯片互连设计，对SI/PI分析具有参考价值。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: SI/PI analysis for 2.5D 3D and Chiplet packaging
